subject: Feb 8th, 2026
fact: The session date is recorded as Feb 8th, 2026.
source_quote: Date: Feb 8th, 2026

subject: Black Ember Outpost
fact: The party stood victorious over the carnage at the Black Ember Outpost.
source_quote: The party stood victorious over the carnage at the Black Ember Outpost

subject: Path of the Shadows
fact: The path forward was down a well on the Path of the Shadows.
source_quote: The path forward, on the Path of the Shadows, was down a well

subject: storeroom
fact: The party searched the storeroom before descending into the well.
source_quote: Before descending into the well, the party searched the storeroom

subject: hidden chest
fact: A hidden chest was discovered in the storeroom.
source_quote: discovered a hidden chest containing potions of flying and fire giant strength

subject: potions of flying
fact: The hidden chest contained potions of flying.
source_quote: discovered a hidden chest containing potions of flying and fire giant strength

subject: potions of fire giant strength
fact: The hidden chest contained potions of fire giant strength.
source_quote: discovered a hidden chest containing potions of flying and fire giant strength

subject: coral gemstones
fact: Coral gemstones worth a considerable sum were found in the chest.
source_quote: along with coral gemstones worth a considerable sum

subject: staging the scene
fact: The party decided to stage an elaborate scene inspired by a play about pretending the dead were still alive.
source_quote: decided to stage an elaborate scene inspired by a play about pretending the dead were still alive

subject: Daein's performance
fact: Daein's performance was so convincing that the bodies of the fire giant and ogres appeared to be merely resting.
source_quote: Daein's performance was so convincing that the bodies of the fire giant and ogres appeared to be merely resting

subject: well
fact: The party plunged into the dark, murky waters of the well.
source_quote: The party plunged into the dark, murky waters of the well

subject: Bramgrim
fact: Bramgrim rode on the Owlbear's back because he was too short to navigate the five-foot depth.
source_quote: Bramgrim and Felkur—both too short to comfortably navigate the five-foot depth—riding on the Owlbear's back

subject: Felkur
fact: Felkur rode on the Owlbear's back because he was too short to navigate the five-foot depth.
source_quote: Bramgrim and Felkur—both too short to comfortably navigate the five-foot depth—riding on the Owlbear's back

subject: Owlbear
fact: The Owlbear carried Bramgrim and Felkur through the well.
source_quote: riding on the Owlbear's back

subject: tunnel
fact: The party swam through a tunnel for about forty feet.
source_quote: They swam through a tunnel for about forty feet

subject: Solom Ned'razak's private office
fact: The tunnel emerged into a large cave that served as Solom Ned'razak's private office.
source_quote: emerging into a large cave that served as Solom Ned'razak's private office

subject: Solom Ned'razak
fact: Solom Ned'razak was a drow wizard who worked to subvert the power of Lolth's clerics.
source_quote: learned that the drow wizard had been working to subvert the power of Lolth's clerics in Maerimydra

subject: the Blink
fact: Solom Ned'razak had developed theories about a mysterious event called the Blink.
source_quote: developed theories about a mysterious event called the Blink

subject: faerzress
fact: The Blink caused the faerzress to flicker dramatically before returning to normal.
source_quote: caused all the faerzress—a dimension-controlling substance that provides illumination and blocks teleportation—to flicker dramatically before returning to normal

subject: Menzoberranzan
fact: Solom blamed powerful wizards and liches from Menzoberranzan for the Blink.
source_quote: blaming powerful wizards and liches from Menzoberranzan for the catastrophe

subject: Lolth
fact: Lolth used the Blink event to escape her imprisonment.
source_quote: Lolth herself had used the event to escape her imprisonment

subject: Maerimydra
fact: The tunnel opened into Maerimydra, a city of fire and ash.
source_quote: The tunnel finally opened into Maerimydra itself, a city of fire and ash

subject: Graz'zt's forces
fact: Maerimydra is now controlled by demonic forces aligned with the demon lord Graz'zt.
source_quote: now controlled by demonic forces aligned with the demon lord Graz'zt

subject: fire giants
fact: The streets of Maerimydra are patrolled by fire giants.
source_quote: its streets patrolled by fire giants

subject: armored ogres
fact: The streets of Maerimydra are patrolled by armored ogres.
source_quote: armored ogres

subject: hellhounds
fact: The streets of Maerimydra are patrolled by hellhounds.
source_quote: hellhounds

subject: demons
fact: The streets of Maerimydra are patrolled by demons of all varieties.
source_quote: demons of all varieties

subject: Hledh
fact: The Fire Giant Queen Hledh resides in the eastern castle.
source_quote: eastern castle with towers stretching to the ceiling housed the Fire Giant Queen Hledh

subject: eastern castle
fact: The eastern castle has towers stretching to the ceiling.
source_quote: eastern castle with towers stretching to the ceiling

subject: coliseum
fact: A massive coliseum looms in the southern district.
source_quote: a massive coliseum loomed in the southern district

subject: Pipyap
fact: The party encountered an imp named Pipyap being tormented by ogres.
source_quote: encountered four ogres tormenting a small creature by its barbed tail—an imp desperately clutching a bloodstained satchel

subject: bloodstained satchel
fact: Pipyap was desperately clutching a bloodstained satchel.
source_quote: desperately clutching a bloodstained satchel

subject: combat with ogres
fact: Daein, Akritas, the Owlbear, and Felkur's magic made short work of the ogres.
source_quote: Daein, Akritas, the Owlbear, and Felkur's magic making short work of the ogres

subject: Akritas
fact: Akritas participated in the battle against the ogres.
source_quote: Daein, Akritas, the Owlbear, and Felkur's magic making short work of the ogres

subject: Pipyap's rescue
fact: Pipyap eagerly accepted food from the party after being rescued.
source_quote: The rescued imp introduced himself as Pipyap and eagerly accepted food from the party

subject: contract negotiation
fact: The party crafted a favorable agreement using their experience from a previous deal with an Ultraloth.
source_quote: crafting a favorable agreement using their experience from a previous deal with an Ultraloth

subject: Ultraloth
fact: The party had a previous deal with an Ultraloth.
source_quote: experience from a previous deal with an Ultraloth

subject: Nine Hells
fact: Pipyap had no desire to return to the Nine Hells.
source_quote: where he had no desire to go

subject: Veperyd
fact: Pipyap identified Veperyd as a fiendish giant who ran the Coliseum and its betting operations.
source_quote: Veperyd, who ran the Coliseum and its betting operations

subject: Vraxen
fact: Vraxen is a Yugoloth who lives in the Spire of Inevitable Reckoning.
source_quote: Vraxen, a Yugoloth who lived in the Spire of Inevitable Reckoning

subject: Spire of Inevitable Reckoning
fact: The Spire of Inevitable Reckoning houses a book the party needs to steal and a teleportation circle.
source_quote: the same tower that housed both the book the party needed to steal and a teleportation circle they could use to escape

subject: Mulmaster wizard
fact: A wizard from Mulmaster arrived for dinner at Vraxen's residence.
source_quote: a wizard from Mulmaster had arrived for dinner at the residence of Vraxen

subject: Hillsfar
fact: Bramgrim recalled that Hillsfar had been controlled by Graz'zt.
source_quote: Bramgrim recalled that Hillsfar had been controlled by Graz'zt

subject: salt
fact: Pipyap complained about the lack of salt in the party's provisions.
source_quote: complained about the lack of salt in their provisions

subject: Daein's illusion performance
fact: Daein's auditory illusion performance included the fire giant remarking that the human prisoner was particularly beautiful.
source_quote: Daein's auditory illusion performance included the fire giant remarking that the human prisoner was particularly beautiful

subject: Akritas's critical hit
fact: Akritas landed a staggering critical hit with her oath-sworn bow, dealing over 50 points of damage to the fire giant sergeant.
source_quote: Akritas landed a staggering critical hit with her oath-sworn bow, dealing over 50 points of damage to the fire giant sergeant in a single strike

subject: oath-sworn bow
fact: Akritas used her oath-sworn bow to deal over 50 points of damage.
source_quote: Akritas landed a staggering critical hit with her oath-sworn bow

subject: Lolth's escape
fact: The party discovered that Lolth used the 'Blink' event to escape her imprisonment.
source_quote: The party discovered that Lolth used the 'Blink' event to escape her imprisonment

subject: Daein
fact: Daein killed an ogre and struck the giant twice with an axe while winking at Bramgrim.
source_quote: Daein killed an ogre and struck the giant twice with an axe while winking at Bramgrim

subject: axe
fact: Daein struck the giant twice with an axe.
source_quote: struck the giant twice with an axe

subject: Bramgrim's healing
fact: Bramgrim cast mass healing word after being shamed by Daein's offensive.
source_quote: Bramgrim, shamed by Daein's relentless offensive, relented his healing-only stance to cast mass healing word

subject: human prisoner
fact: The fire giant remarked that the human prisoner was particularly beautiful.
source_quote: remarked that the human prisoner was particularly beautiful

subject: fire giant sergeant
fact: Akritas delivered the finishing blow to the fire giant sergeant.
source_quote: Akritas killed the fire giant sergeant

subject: Felkur's distraction
fact: Felkur used Mage Hand to strip ogres of their uniforms, causing distraction.
source_quote: Felkur used MageHand to strip ogres of their uniforms, causing distraction

subject: Daein's illusion
fact: Daein created an illusion of a female hellhound to lure male hellhounds.
source_quote: Daein created an illusion of a female hellhound to lure male hellhounds

subject: Felkur's fireball
fact: Felkur initiated combat with a fireball on ogres.
source_quote: Felkur initiated combat with a fireball on ogres

subject: Felkur's cannon
fact: Felkur targeted giants with a cannon.
source_quote: targeted giants with a cannon

subject: Bramgrim's spirit guardians
fact: Bramgrim engaged with spirit guardians.
source_quote: Bramgrim engaged with spirit guardians

subject: hellhounds
fact: Two hellhounds were killed, while a third escaped out of the outpost.
source_quote: Two hellhounds were killed, while a third escaped out of the outpost

subject: Bramgrim's Silence
fact: Bramgrim cast Silence to prevent alarms at the well.
source_quote: Bramgrim cast Silence to prevent alarms at the well

subject: Daein's damage reduction
fact: A fire giant critically hit Daein for 50 points of damage, which Daein reduced to 45.
source_quote: A fire giant critically hit Daein for 50 points of damage, which Daein reduced to 45

subject: Bramgrim's loss of concentration
fact: Bramgrim lost concentration on spirit guardians after being struck by an ogre.
source_quote: Bramgrim lost concentration on spirit guardians after being struck by an ogre

subject: Bramgrim's necrotic damage
fact: Bramgrim dealt 27 points of necrotic damage with mass healing word.
source_quote: dealt 27 points of necrotic damage

fact: The party found a chest beneath a ragged blanket.
source_quote: found a chest beneath a ragged blanket

fact: The party discovered a potion of flying in the chest.
source_quote: They discovered a potion of flying, a potion of fire giant strength, and coral gemstones worth 400 gold pieces

fact: The party discovered a potion of fire giant strength in the chest.

fact: The party discovered coral gemstones worth 400 gold pieces in the chest.

fact: Daein's staging was inspired by a play about pretending someone was alive who wasn't (Weekend at Bernie's).

fact: The well led to a large pool of dark, warm, five-foot-deep water.

fact: They found a five-foot-wide tunnel at the bottom of the pool.

fact: The party found a lamp in Solom Ned'razak's office.

fact: The party removed rubble blocking the tunnel, revealing Maerimydra.

subject: Maerimydra
fact: Maerimydra is nestled in a titanic cavern 600 feet tall at its highest point.
source_quote: nestled in a titanic cavern 600 feet tall at its highest point

subject: Maerimydra
fact: Maerimydra is controlled by demonic evil forces aligned with Graz'zt.
source_quote: It is controlled by demonic evil forces aligned with Graz'zt

subject: Maerimydra
fact: Maerimydra features plateaus 100 feet high connected by 100-foot-wide grand stairs.
source_quote: a thick smoke layer above 250 feet, and is lit by numerous burning braziers creating a heavy charcoal scent

subject: Six-Fingered Courtyard
fact: The Six-Fingered Courtyard is surrounded by black spires bearing a prominent six-fingered symbol.
source_quote: surrounded by black spires bearing a prominent six-fingered symbol

subject: Six-Fingered Courtyard
fact: Demons and giants gather at the Six-Fingered Courtyard to worship a demon lord.
source_quote: Demons and giants gather here to worship a demon lord

subject: Coliseum
fact: The Coliseum is a massive structure dominating the southern end of the residential district in Maerimydra.
source_quote: A massive coliseum dominating the southern end of the residential district in Maerimydra

subject: Coliseum
fact: Great gladiator fights occur at the Coliseum.
source_quote: where great gladiator fights occur

subject: Eastern Castle
fact: The Eastern Castle has two towers stretching from floor to ceiling.
source_quote: with two towers stretching from floor to ceiling

subject: The Spire of Inevitable Reckoning
fact: The Spire of Inevitable Reckoning contains the book the party seeks.
source_quote: It contains the book the party seeks

subject: The Spire of Inevitable Reckoning
fact: The Spire of Inevitable Reckoning contains a teleportation circle.
source_quote: and a teleportation circle

subject: The Spire of Inevitable Reckoning
fact: A dinner event is scheduled to occur at the Spire of Inevitable Reckoning.
source_quote: A dinner event is scheduled to occur here

subject: Potion of Flying
fact: The Potion of Flying was found in a chest beneath a ragged blanket in the storeroom of the Black Ember Outpost.
source_quote: A magical potion found in a chest beneath a ragged blanket in the storeroom of the Black Ember Outpost

subject: Potion of Fire Giant Strength
fact: The Potion of Fire Giant Strength was found in a chest beneath a ragged blanket in the storeroom of the Black Ember Outpost.
source_quote: A magical potion found in a chest beneath a ragged blanket in the storeroom of the Black Ember Outpost

subject: Coral Gemstones
fact: Coral Gemstones were found in a chest beneath a ragged blanket in the storeroom of the Black Ember Outpost.
source_quote: Gemstones found in a chest beneath a ragged blanket in the storeroom of the Black Ember Outpost

subject: Coral Gemstones
fact: The Coral Gemstones were valued at a total of 400 gold pieces.
source_quote: valued at a total of 400 gold pieces

subject: Solom Ned'razak's Notes
fact: Solom Ned'razak's Notes contain his research, theories on the Blink event, and observations about demons.
source_quote: Papers found in Solom Ned'razak's private office containing his research, theories on the 'Blink' event in the faerzress, observations about demons appearing after the Blink

subject: Solom Ned'razak's Notes
fact: Solom Ned'razak's Notes include complaints about not thinking of the Blink idea himself.
source_quote: The notes also included his complaints about not thinking of the Blink idea himself

subject: Contract with Pipyap
fact: The Contract with Pipyap binds him to provide information and assistance without violating previous contracts.
source_quote: binding him to provide information and assistance without violating previous contracts

subject: The Book
fact: The Book is located in The Spire of Inevitable Reckoning.
source_quote: located in The Spire of Inevitable Reckoning

subject: Pipyap's Satchel
fact: Pipyap's Satchel is a bloodstained satchel with an oversized button.
source_quote: A bloodstained satchel with an oversized button

subject: Pipyap's Satchel
fact: Pipyap desperately tried to keep hold of his satchel while being tormented by ogres.
source_quote: He desperately tried to keep hold of it while being tormented by ogres

subject: ogres
fact: Four ogres were tormenting Pipyap in Maerimydra.
source_quote: rescued by the party from four ogres in Maerimydra

subject: ogres
fact: Ogres were hauling water from a well in the storeroom of the Black Ember Outpost.
source_quote: where ogres were hauling water from a well

subject: hellhounds
fact: The Black Ember Outpost served as a base for hellhounds.
source_quote: It served as a base for fire giants, ogres, and hellhounds

subject: hellhounds
fact: Daein created the vocalization of a female hellhound to lure male hellhounds.
source_quote: to create the vocalization of a female hellhound to lure male hellhounds

subject: fiendish giants
fact: Two fiendish giants were identified by Pipyap: one in charge of the Coliseum and one managing the six-fingered courtyard.
source_quote: He identified the locations of two fiendish giants: one in charge of the Coliseum (Veperyd) and another managing the six-fingered courtyard

subject: fire giant
fact: A fire giant sergeant and his troops were present at the Black Ember Outpost.
source_quote: creating a distraction for the fire giant sergeant and his troops

subject: fire giant
fact: Daein mimicked a fire giant's voice to convince the outpost that the giants had won.
source_quote: to mimic a fire giant's voice to convince the rest of the outpost that the giants had won the battle

subject: dinner event
fact: A dinner event is scheduled at Vraxen's residence where a Mulmaster wizard intends to acquire the book.
source_quote: A dinner event is scheduled to occur here

subject: theft of betting money
fact: Veperyd has been stealing money from Vraxen's betting pool.
source_quote: Veperyd stealing from Vraxen's bets

subject: Blink event
fact: The Blink event caused the faerzress to change and allowed demons to appear.
source_quote: his theories on the 'Blink' event in the faerzress, his observations on the appearance of demons

subject: Lolth's clerics
fact: Lolth's clerics were unable to commune with her for some time.
source_quote: whose clerics were unable to commune with her for some time

subject: Lolth's clerics
fact: Lolth's clerics are regaining their powers after being silent.
source_quote: notes about Lolth's clerics regaining their powers after being silent
